Marina basin approx 2.0-2.5 m; little margin for 2.1 m draft at wind-driven low water.
Entrance dredged approx 2.5-3 m but silts; easterly winds can lower the level 0.5 m+; marginal at low water.
Schlei fairway maintained approx 5 m; bascule bridge opens at fixed times for passage further up-Schlei.
Short buoyed side channel approx 2.5-3 m; keep strictly to the buoys, flats on both sides.
Small basin only approx 2-2.5 m in parts and very tight; pick your spot carefully with 2.1 m.
Buoyed approach approx 2.5-3 m; adequate at normal water levels.
Entrance silts; wind-driven low water can make entry impossible - treat as marginal for 2.1 m.
Dredged entrance channel approx 2.5-3 m, prone to silting after storms; follow the buoys exactly.
Above the Kappeln bridge (opening required); narrow marked channel off Arnis.
Deep water in Alssund; the bascule bridge opens at scheduled times for passage north.
Enter via Stegsvig through a narrow buoyed channel (approx 3.0-3.5 m, ~30 m wide, 5 kn max).
Buoyed fairway up Augustenborg Fjord, approx 3 m in the upper reaches.
Buoyed channel across shoal ground, approx 2.5-3 m; respect the buoyage.
Entrance approx 2.5-3 m; exposed in strong easterly winds.
Keep well clear of the Als-Fyn/Ærø ferries when approaching.
Buoyed approach channel through flats; keep strictly to the channel, shoals close on both sides.
Buoyed approaches approx 3.2 m (N and W), 4.5 m from S; parts of the yacht basin only approx 2 m.
Deep water but strong reversing current (up to ~2.5 kn) in Svendborg Sund.
Small basin approx 2-2.5 m - tight for 2.1 m; current sets across the entrance.
Only via Rudkøbing Løb, a narrow dredged channel (approx 3 m) through extensive flats; hard reversing current.
Basin approx 2.5 m with shallow flats around the island; follow the buoyed approach.
Basin approx 2.5 m; approach from N over gradually shoaling ground.
Basin approx 2.5-3 m, shoal ground close outside the moles.
Harbor approx 2.5-3 m; strong current in the Årøsund channel.
Via Egernsund bascule bridge (scheduled openings), then buoyed channel approx 2.5 m across shallow Nybøl Nor.
Buoyed approach approx 2.5 m through a shallow bay - little margin for 2.1 m.
